defs: to shave the whole head clean

pinyin: ti4 tou2 tiao1 zi5 yi1 tou2 re4
defs: lit. only one end of the barber's pole is hot (idiom)
one party is interested, but the other, not so much
(Note: In former days, street barbers carried their equipment on a pole, with tools and a stool at one end and a brazier at the other.)
the Qing order to all men to shave their heads but keep a queue, first ordered in 1646
to shave the head but keep the queue
